name: BugCard Write Gate
description: Validate BugCard completeness before writing to knowledge library

then.prompt: If the current write operation targets a file matching **/knowledge/library/**/*bugcard*.yaml, verify that all 12 required BugCard fields are present (bugcard_id, title, symptom_tags, trigger_tags, violated_invariants, recommended_sop, causal_anchor_type, causal_anchor_ref, causal_chain_summary, root_cause_summary, fingerprint, fix_verified). If any required field is missing, DENY the write and list the missing fields. If the file does not match the BugCard pattern, ALLOW the write to proceed.
